nasb.text: Now Reuben returned to the pit, and behold, Joseph was not in the pit; so he tore his garments.

esv.text: When Reuben returned to the pit and saw that Joseph was not in the pit, he tore his clothes

cnv.text: 流本回到枯井那裡，見約瑟不在井裡，就撕裂自己的衣服。

ccb.text: 吕便回到井边发现约瑟不见了，就伤心地撕裂了身上的衣服，

csbs.text: 鲁本回到那坑，见约瑟不在坑里，就撕裂自己的衣服，
